creator: bsd@tuxproject.de
text:
diff -ruN rodentalt/Makefile rodentneu/Makefile
--- rodentalt/Makefile	2012-06-30 17:00:59.000000000 +0200
+++ rodentneu/Makefile	2012-06-30 17:04:48.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,13 +1,12 @@
 # Ports collection Makefile for:	rodent
-# Date created:				16 March 2012
+# Date created:				30 June 2012
 # Whom:					Jens K. Loewe <bsd@tuxproject.de>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/x11-fm/rodent/Makefile,v 1.2 2012/06/01 05:25:30
dinoex Exp $
 #

 PORTNAME=	rodent
-PORTVERSION=	4.7.4
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	4.8.0
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/xffm/${PORTVERSION}/

diff -ruN rodentalt/distinfo rodentneu/distinfo
--- rodentalt/distinfo	2012-06-30 17:00:59.000000000 +0200
+++ rodentneu/distinfo	2012-06-30 17:05:52.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

40ee87755a1ef4f789bdab5d419da2d409145a3480218d1d122e072c5267a4ba

4ab02052086690ba4e9ce4946ceff1218e0d98a269bfccd45e93a754d3c8ead9
+SIZE (rodent-4.8.0.tar.gz) = 11666749
